name: Making Friends Booster
description: 7 skills for peer connection and friendship

activities.title: Find Common Ground
activities.target: Ask 3 questions to discover shared interests
activities.script_parent: Teach questions: 'What do you like to do?' 'Do you like [topic]?' 'What's your favorite [category]?' Practice!
activities.script_child: Ask questions to find things you both like.
activities.success_criteria: Asks 2+ discovery questions in role-play or real interaction 3/5 times
activities.generalization: Meeting new peers, playdates, first days

questions: What do you do for fun?

activities.title: Compliment + Question
activities.target: Give compliment then ask related question to start conversation
activities.script_parent: Say something nice, then ask about it: 'Cool shoes! Where'd you get them?' Practice combinations!
activities.script_child: Say something nice, then ask a question about it.
activities.success_criteria: Uses compliment + question combo 2/4 initiation opportunities

activities.title: Invite to Play
activities.target: Use direct invitation script with peer
activities.script_parent: Teach: 'Want to play [activity]?' or 'Can I play with you?' Direct and simple! Practice and role-play.
activities.script_child: Ask them if they want to play!
activities.success_criteria: Uses invitation script 2/4 appropriate play opportunities

activities.title: Share Turn Cues
activities.target: Use verbal turn-taking phrases during play
activities.script_parent: Teach: 'My turn,' 'Your turn now,' 'Can I have a turn?' Practice during games! Make it fun.
activities.script_child: Use your turn-taking words during play.
activities.success_criteria: Uses turn phrases 4/6 turn transitions during play
activities.generalization: Board games, playground, taking turns with toys

activities.title: Fix a Misstep
activities.target: Apologize and make repair after social mistake
activities.script_parent: Teach: 'Sorry, I didn't mean to.' Then fix it if possible. Practice! Model how to make it right.
activities.script_child: Say sorry and try to make it better.
activities.success_criteria: Apologizes and attempts repair 3/5 social mistakes
activities.generalization: When accidents happen, conflicts arise, mistakes made

activities.title: Include Someone New
activities.target: Invite peer who's alone to join activity
prompting_hierarchy: remind to look for lonely peers
activities.script_parent: Notice someone alone? Say: 'Want to play with us?' Model kindness! Praise when they do it.
activities.script_child: If you see someone alone, you can invite them!
activities.success_criteria: Includes someone new (with prompt or independently) 2/5 opportunities observed
activities.mastery_rule: Any instances are success! This is advanced empathy.

variants.script: You can be on my team!

activities.title: Say Thanks
activities.target: Say 'thank you' when peer shares, helps, or is kind
activities.script_parent: When they share or help: 'Say thank you!' Model it first. Make it habit!
activities.success_criteria: Says thank you 4/5 appropriate moments with verbal prompt or less
activities.generalization: Playdates, school, home with siblings, anywhere
